title: Manalaser
description: A tech datapack that adds laser-powered machines
body:
**Manalaser is a tech datapack, which aims to enhance the minecraft redstone experience with adjacently adding a laser system. These lasers can be used to do things like teleport players, instantly transport blocks, and detect monsters.**

Most ideas in this datapack were thought of by the SkyWillDie community (y'all are weirdly creative), which means that rainbow lasers and The FLDSMDFR are also a part of this.
